title: lens culinaris subsp. microsperma
intro: Lens culinaris subsp. microsperma, also known as the microsperma lentil or small-seeded lentil, is a subspecies of the lentil plant that is native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lens culinaris subsp. microsperma include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and reduce the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
